title: Goals
description: A wellness goal the user sets and the coaching/coach tracks against their own metrics — e.g. 'sleep 7h', 'walk 8000 steps'. The coach checks progress and proposes follow-ups. Observations only, not medical advice.

title.description: the goal, e.g. 'Average 7 hours of sleep'

metricKind.description: the metric kind this goal tracks against, if any (e.g. 'sleep_hours' | 'steps')

target.description: the numeric target for `metricKind`, if any

current.description: the latest computed progress value the coach filled in

status.description: 'active' | 'met' | 'archived' — set by the coach or the user
